Hero.title: The softest thing you'll wear today.
Hero.body: Easewear is built for the women who do everything — and want to feel like themselves while doing it. Layer it, live in it, love it.

Stories.title: Made for how you live, not how you're shaped.

fabric.title: Fabric quality
fabric.body: Modal, cotton, bamboo. Sourced for softness, tested for the long haul.

fit.title: Perfect fit
fit.body: Designed on real bodies, in five sizes that actually fit five different women.

conscious.title: Conscious comfort
conscious.body: Made locally in small runs. Less waste, more pieces you reach for daily.

Product.noReviews: Be the first to review this piece.

SizeGuide.title: Find your easewear fit.
SizeGuide.intro: Our sizing is true and slightly generous through the waist. If you're between sizes, size down for fitted pieces (capsules) and up for relaxed sets.

howTo.title: How to measure
howTo.bust: Bust: around the fullest part, keeping the tape level.
howTo.waist: Waist: the narrowest point, usually above the navel.
howTo.hip: Hip: around the widest part, about 20 cm below the waist.

story.title: We started easewear because comfort had become a compromise.
story.body: The pieces that felt the best — modal, cotton, bamboo — were rarely the pieces that fit. So we started designing on real bodies in Cairo, and we built a brand for the days women actually live: school runs, board rooms, prayer mats, gym mats, plane seats, the in-between.

vision.title: A world where what you wear at home is also what you want to wear out.

mission.title: Make every woman feel like herself, in every layer.
mission.body: We size for real bodies, we stitch in Egypt, and we choose fabrics for how they feel after the third wash, not the first. Smaller drops, fewer returns, more loved pieces.

softness.title: Softness, always
softness.body: Fabric chosen for the long haul, not the photograph. Modal, cotton, bamboo.

realFit.title: Real fit
realFit.body: Designed on five different bodies, sampled until the fit holds across them.

localHands.title: Local hands
localHands.body: Made in Cairo, in small runs, by people who get paid the way they should.

Footer.tagline: Comfort-wear designed for every woman's body, day, and mood. Made in Egypt, worn everywhere.
